text: Here, in this stark yet modern environment, I am struck by the interplay of transparency and function. The glass walls invite reflection, both literal and metaphorical—what truly separates spaces, or thoughts? The fire extinguisher and R+D display remind me that even amidst intellectual pursuits, the practical and the creative must coexist. I feel curious and contemplative, as though my own boundaries are dissolving with the glass, allowing new ideas to flow freely.
